data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding policy fields.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of specific policy fields (deadline, fee, max transfer count) but does not provide any evidence confirming their existence or values. The prior steps do not include any checks or reads that would confirm these policy fields are set or linked to the bookings. Therefore, the evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure or success.
gaps: No evidence of policy fields (deadline, fee, max transfer count) being validated or present.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence for policy fields
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the existence and values of policy fields.
